title: Engineering Prototypes
description: Precision engineered prototypes for automotive components
fullDescription: We developed a series of high-precision prototypes for an automotive client, including bracket assemblies, housing covers, and functional test parts. Each component was printed with tight tolerances using industrial-grade FDM printers, then post-processed for surface finish and dimensional accuracy. The prototypes were used for fit-and-function testing before committing to injection molding tooling.

title: Custom Miniatures
fullDescription: A set of highly detailed miniature figurines created for a private collector. Using SLA resin printing, we achieved sub-millimeter detail on facial features, clothing textures, and accessories. Each piece was hand-finished, primed, and delivered ready for painting. The project involved 12 unique characters based on client-provided reference artwork.

title: Product Development
description: Complete product design and development cycle
fullDescription: End-to-end product development for a consumer gadget startup. We handled CAD modeling from initial sketches, produced multiple iterative prototypes for ergonomic testing, and refined the design through 4 revision cycles. The final prototype was used for investor presentations and crowdfunding campaign photography.

title: 3D Printed Models
fullDescription: Conceptual and architectural scale models produced for a design studio's client pitch. The models included a 1:100 scale building exterior with removable roof sections to reveal interior layouts. Printed in multiple parts and assembled with precision, the models were painted and detailed to match the architectural renderings.

title: Industrial Components
fullDescription: Large-scale production run of 500+ industrial components for a manufacturing client. Parts included jigs, fixtures, and end-use components for assembly lines. We implemented a strict quality control process with dimensional checks on every 10th part, ensuring consistency across the entire batch. Delivered on schedule with full documentation.

title: Custom Keychains
fullDescription: Produced 300 custom branded keychains for a corporate tech conference. Each keychain featured the company logo in raised relief with a flexible TPU loop. We handled the full workflow from logo vectorization to final print and finishing. Items were individually bagged and labeled, ready for distribution at the event.

title: Mechanical Parts
fullDescription: Custom mechanical components including gears, brackets, and housing assemblies for a precision engineering firm. Parts were printed in high-strength Nylon and carbon fiber reinforced PLA to meet load-bearing requirements. Post-processing included drilling, tapping, and surface treatment for final assembly integration.

title: Architectural Models
fullDescription: Detailed 1:200 scale architectural models for a real estate development presentation. The project included three building blocks with surrounding landscape, roads, and greenery. Transparent PLA was used for windows, and the base was laser-cut acrylic. The models were used in a high-profile investor meeting and later displayed in the developer's showroom.

title: Functional Prototypes
fullDescription: Functional prototypes for a consumer electronics product undergoing validation testing. The enclosures, button mechanisms, and cable management parts were printed and assembled into working units. These were subjected to drop tests, thermal cycling, and user testing sessions. Feedback from testing directly informed the final production design.
